name: planning-poker
description: Simple Planning Poker application with Fibonacci cards

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.clean: rm -rf server/dist client/build node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules

author: Rovo Dev
